title: Repealed by  Acts 2006, No. 621, §23(D), eff. when Orleans Parish sheriff takes office in 2010; Acts 2008, No. 873, §1, extended the date to 2014; Acts 2009, No. 125, §1, changed the date to 2010.
doc_html: §1501.1.  Repealed by  Acts 2006, No. 621, §23(D), eff. when Orleans Parish sheriff takes office in 2010; Acts 2008, No. 873, §1, extended the date to 2014; Acts 2009, No. 125, §1, changed the date to 2010.
